feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Datasphere performance issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

   I am facing some performance issues with datasphere modeling. Here is my design structures:

Background: We have to create SAC report based on COPA Actual/Plan Data and some other External Data as well.

Modeling Steps refer to above:

1. Preload COPA Actual Data(20 M Records), Budget Data(1 M Records), External Data(10 K Records) to local Table and store table data in memory. Then create views based on local tables and make projections to reduce the no. of columns. Filters and Aggregations are also applied to reduce the total no. of records.

2. Use Input parameters to limit amount of data access.

3. Create UNION for Actual and Plan data

4. Create UNION for External data and above(3)

5. Aggregation based on final data structure

6. Various Calculated column(simple calculation) created

7. Fact source view created(Measures: 110 / Attribute: 45) and used by Analytic Model. Till this point, no. of records have reduced to 2M

SAC then use this Analytic Model for Reporting

Now here comes the trouble: 

1. When I Preview data in the Analytic Model, it takes 30~40 seconds to show the result, the acceptable response time is within 10 secs.

2. While the model is consumed by SAC, as we create more calculations(YTD, Last year YTD...etc) SAC crashes.

Is there any suggestion for performance improvement ?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: How to check database connectivity from os for java system?
entry.content: r3trans -d this for ABAP systems. What is command for Java system?

entry.title: ABAP CDS extractor on NSDM_E_MCHBH (replacement of MCHBH) in not getting delta in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created a ABAP CDS delta extractor on NSDM_E_MCHBH (replacement of MCHBH) using CDC. SAP recommends to use replacement if available. When the extractor is used in DataSphere Replication flow, the delta load is failing. 

Error - CDS view is Inconsistent and Definition of the view is too complex for automatic CDC

Note - We are getting warning "Definition of view is too complex for automatic CDS" and "Data extraction of CDS entity not possible" in ABAP perspective. We ignored the warning as it was for other extractor's as well and they are fine.

Note , even extractor on MCHBH we faced the same issue.

Please let me know how we can get delta from table MCHBH using ABAP CDS view extractor.

Thanks,

entry.title: Import/Export Route from Dev/QA/Prod
entry.content:
Hello 

Would like to know how the depoyment in Datasphere works, if there are Dev - QA - Prod Tenant. 

Dev - Export Package_A will be created 
QA - In Import Queue, we will see the corresponding Export Package_A, and deployment will be done.
Prod - What are the Options? 

Can we still use the same Export Package_A ? if yes ? how to use the same Package_A and import to Prod ? 

Manualy Export is the only option from QA to Prod ??

entry.title: system tables of DSP aren't visible in core DSP
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

Is there a way to access system tables like VIEW_COLUMNS in core SAP Data Sphere (excluding Hana Explorer)?

 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Can not use replication flows to replicate CDS Views from S4HANA OP to Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi all,
I want to replicate CDS Views from S/4HANA On Premise to Datapshere using Replication Flows but I get this error while trying to import the CDS Views "Getting dataset definition failed for <the path to cds view>"

I have checked the relevant SAP Notes but could not figure out what the problem is.
In the CDS Views, there is also these annotations specified

@Analytics:{

dataCategory: #DIMENSION,

dataExtraction: {

enabled: true,

delta.changeDataCapture: {

automatic : true

}}}

Appreciate help from everyone in the community. Thank you!

@tobias_koebler @DanielKraemer @VinayBhatt 
I have seen the articles from you guys, maybe you can help here...? Many thanks!

entry.title: Inconsistent Replication Flow Behavior in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Good day,

I am currently working on implementing business content within SAP Datasphere and have encountered issues with the replication flows. The flows are inconsistent—sometimes they run and complete successfully in a short time, while other times, the same flow hangs and takes hours to finish, despite processing a similar number of records.

I've also observed that manually restarting a specific object within the replication flow often resolves the issue, and it completes successfully. However, when the system automatically retries the process, it tends to hang. Additionally, I have scheduled the loads, but they frequently end up locking because the previous replication flow is still running.

Has anyone experienced similar issues, or does anyone have suggestions for ensuring the replication flows run more reliably? Your assistance would be greatly appreciated.

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: How to create fiscal year period hierarchy in datasphere
entry.content:
I Need to create Fiscal Year Period Hierarchy . Below is the required structure that we need to display 

Year > Quarter > Period ,Year

entry.title: FreeHand SQL query with input parameters
entry.content:
Good morning SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere experts.

I recently created a successful OData connection from a view with Datasphere parameters to use the data in an SAP Analytics Cloud Planning model.

The problem I have is that I want to select the parameters from a FreeHand query when creating the model and I get different errors.

I am testing several syntaxes:

CV_MOV_CCEE_RD_WP(P_MANDT='100',P_DATE_FROM=1980-01-01,P_DATE_TO=1980-01-01)/Set

And I get this error:

If I use this syntax

CV_MOV_CCEE_RD_WP/CV_MOV_CCEE_RD_WP(P_MANDT='100',P_DATE_FROM=1980-01-01,P_DATE_TO=1980-01-01)/Set

I get an error like this:

When I use this syntax:

CV_MOV_CCEE_RD_WP(P_MANDT='100',P_DATE_FROM=1980-01-01,P_DATE_TO=1980-01-01)

I get this error:

So I understand that the syntax here is incorrect.

I have tried ending the statement with /Results but it doesn't work either.

I have consulted other questions and documentation such as these:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sac-how-to-use-odata-v4-with-parameters-exposed-from-a-s-4hana-cds-view/qaq-p/12690021
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-sac-free-hand-query/qaq-p/12622748
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/bwplaolap/3361384392.html

But I have not been able to find a solution

What would I have to do to be able to do the freehand query for views with input parameters coming from Datasphere over OData connections?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Datasphere to ADLS Gen2 Connectivity
entry.content:
Introduction

By the end of this article, you will be able to establish connectivity between Datasphere and Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 using a Service Principal with a Certificate.

A service principal in Azure is an identity created for applications, hosted services, and automated tools to securely access Azure resources. It defines the permissions and roles assigned to the application within a given tenant.

In the SAP ecosystem, it functions similarly to a technical account used for connecting to different systems for RFC calls.

Pre-requisites:

ADLS Gen2 Storage Account, Service Principle with Certificate.

Steps to Configure:

Login to SAP Datasphere

Go to <Your Space> -> Connections -> Create

Where to find OAuth Token Endpoint, Client ID?

Go to Azure portal -> App Registrations

Certificate and Key:

To Complete the authentication part, Certificate and Key needs to be uploaded.

Extension of the certificate should be in .pem and key should be .key.

Once you receive the SPN with certificate.

  • If the certificate is in a different format, Get the certificate converted to .pem format.

Refer link How to convert pfx to pem – sslhow.com

  • If the certificate and key are in the same file, then separate out certificate and key in two different files in the above-mentioned format.
  • cert.pem

    This completes the set-up at the datasphere side which establishes Data-lake API as end-point

    to connect to ADLS Gen2 Storage Account.

     

    Steps on the Azure side:

  •  

    Assign Read/Write access to SPN for the Azure Gen2 Storage Account.

     

    Note: 

    If the Azure subscription for Datasphere and the subscription for the Azure storage account endpoint are different, you will need to enable the VNET of Datasphere in the network rules of the Azure storage container endpoint. For more information, please refer to the note below.

    3405081 - Connection from SAP Datasphere to Azure storage services in same region which is restricted using firewall rules - SAP for Me

    • Example: Datasphere (Public cloud) connecting to a private storage account, then we need do the below
    • Add the subnet ID of Datasphere in the network rules of target storage account.
    • Whitelisting the outbound IP (egress ID of replication)
    • To Find the subnet ID of Datasphere, got to About

entry.title: Replication Flow : Tables not getting imported using ABAP connection
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently using a free trial of Datasphere and attempting to create a replication flow with an ECC (on-prem) system via an ABAP connection. The connection through the cloud connector works well, and we can see all the objects under the ODP_SAPI container.

However, when selecting any source object (In last step : "Add source objects") , the import fails without showing any error (please see the attached screenshot). I am wondering if anyone else has encountered this issue while working with the replication flow, or if there is something we might have missed during the configuration process.

Looking forward to your feedback.

 

Best Regards,
Yatendra Soni

entry.title: SAP Datasphere connection to SAP Fieldglass without Datahub
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are looking to connect SAP Fieldglass directly instead of using Datahub layer in Fieldglass which will publish report and cloned to datahub. using Datahub we need SAP support to deploy or publish any changes in Fieldglass which is  cost and time consuming . we are trying to connect directly to Fieldglass. 

Any information on connecting to SAP Fieldglass from Data sphere will help us.

entry.title: Hiding Translation and Packages for specific users in DataSphere
entry.content:
Hi guys

I would like to hide Translation and Packages option for specific user
I tries all options in the assigned Role but could find a solution

 

Any ideas?

Shlomi

entry.title: SAP datasphere unable to see space tables in SAP hana Database explorer
entry.content:
Hey Guys

I've been asked make it possible to change data in datasphere with Update statement in the SAP hana database Explorer however I do not see the tables that I've created in Sap  Datasphere space from Sap Hana Database explorer 

Could you please help me out ?

Thanks

entry.title: Missing SAP Datasphere in Trial Account
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am using the Trial account of SAP BTP Cockpit, however there is not SAP Datasphere in "Add Service Plans". 

How can I add it? I would like to test it. 

Thank you

entry.title: Date format validation in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Team,

please help me to validate Date format which is coming from source table or file  in SAP Datasphere.

Thanks,

Bala

entry.title: How to handle non-cumulative data in Datasphere ?
entry.content:
How do you handle non-cumulative data loading and passing to other cloud like GCP or Azure by using SAP Datasphere from S4 system?

In traditional BW, we typically had a separate process for initial setup and compression, such as with stock data. However, if this is currently outside the scope, feel free to disregard.

Any suggestions or artifacts or use case, please share.

entry.title: Snowflake with Datasphere using ADF
entry.content: We are working on integrating Snowflake with Datasphere using ADF, with NO other intermediary. The plan is to have ADF trigger a task chain in Datasphere and once the task chain completes the necessary activity, then, initiate a PULL request using ADF for pulling data from Datasphere into Snowflake. How can we establish the connectivity/integration between Datasphere and Snowflake. Can you provide us with the detailed steps to configure and test the same.

entry.title: disabling manual Transport of Content in sap datasphere
entry.content:
We recently completed setup of transporting the contents of Datasphere through Cloud Transport Management Service referring to help guide Transporting Your Content Through SAP Cloud Transport Management | SAP Help Portal , we are now interested in Disabling the Option of Transporting the Contents through Filesystem and Also through Content Network Storage using Export and Import.

But we could not able to find any system level settings in the Blogs or in help guides to disable the other two options as client is not interested in letting the consultants save the data in their localmachine.

Is there any possibility to control this either in system level or by restricting the roles of SAP DW Administrator and SAP DW Space Administrator in the Datasphere.

entry.title: download CSV I get can't load plugin
entry.content:
when I try and download the file using the link below I get an error couldn't load plugin.  Any idea which plugin I need? 

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/data-warehouse-cloud-1-begin-trial/jcr:content.github-proxy.1715048737.file/SalesOrders.csv
